SEARCH

Uses of Interface
com.falkordb.ResultSet

Packages that use ResultSet
Package
Description
com.falkordb
Core FalkorDB client API: the FalkorDB driver factory plus the Driver, Graph, and result-reading interfaces (ResultSet, Record, Header, Statistics) used to run queries and read their results.

  • Uses of ResultSet in com.falkordb

    Methods in com.falkordb that return ResultSet
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ResultSet
    Graph.callProcedure(String procedure)
    Invokes stored procedures without arguments
    ResultSet
    Graph.callProcedure(String procedure, List<String> args)
    Invokes stored procedure with arguments
    ResultSet
    Graph.callProcedure(String procedure, List<String> args, Map<String,List<String>> kwargs)
    Invoke a stored procedure
    ResultSet
    Graph.profile(String query)
    Execute a Cypher query and produce an execution plan augmented with metrics for each operation's execution.
    ResultSet
    Graph.profile(String query, Map<String,Object> params)
    Execute a Cypher query with parameters and produce an execution plan augmented with metrics for each operation's execution.
    ResultSet
    Graph.query(String query)
    Execute a Cypher query.
    ResultSet
    Graph.query(String query, long timeout)
    Execute a Cypher query with timeout.
    ResultSet
    Graph.query(String query, Map<String,Object> params)
    Executes a cypher query with parameters.
    ResultSet
    Graph.query(String query, Map<String,Object> params, long timeout)
    Executes a cypher query with parameters and timeout.
    ResultSet
    Graph.readOnlyQuery(String query)
    Execute a Cypher read-only query.
    ResultSet
    Graph.readOnlyQuery(String query, long timeout)
    Execute a Cypher read-only query with timeout.
    ResultSet
    Graph.readOnlyQuery(String query, Map<String,Object> params)
    Executes a cypher read-only query with parameters.
    ResultSet
    Graph.readOnlyQuery(String query, Map<String,Object> params, long timeout)
    Executes a cypher read-only query with parameters and timeout.
